highlights.text: The final step was to make a new ATH above that one, and I wrote in my Wednesday newsletter this week: “The short term bull case is that this current consolidation represents a mature bull flag 5790 to 5740, with 5770-72 key mid-pivot.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over how a singular level can (and usually does) provide multiple failed breakdowns (my core setup).

post_title: [RE-SEND] 3 Green Weeks In A Row For SPX. Can October Start Red? Sept 30 Plan
